name: direnv-reload-on-cwd-change
summary: When Claude cd's into a directory with an .envrc, reload direnv so env vars are fresh. For direnv users.
when_to_use: Repos that use direnv and have per-subdir .envrc files (e.g. monorepos with per-package secrets).
verify: cd into a dir with .envrc; confirm env vars are loaded via `direnv status`.
